text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is over. I wonder... Have I actually
improved?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Once summer is over and fall begins, it'll finally
be time for the Kikuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's only a little ways away, but we've still got
some time left. I gotta train super-duper hard
until then!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, please continue to watch over me when
we're back at the academy!
